Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

Veloz Contractors did an amazing job on my kitchen remodel! They transformed my old, outdated kitchen into a modern, functional space. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. I highly recommend them!

D
David S.

I had a leak in my roof after a recent storm, and Veloz Contractors responded quickly and efficiently. They repaired the damage and provided a thorough inspection to ensure there were no other issues. Great service!

J
Jessica L.

I absolutely love my new bathroom! Veloz Contractors took my vision and turned it into a reality. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the attention to detail is impeccable. Thank you!

M
Michael B.

Veloz Contractors poured a new concrete patio for my backyard, and it looks fantastic. The team was professional, efficient, and the price was very reasonable. I would definitely use them again.

Additional General Contractor Services

Veloz Contractors — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every general contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Veloz Contractors Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific general contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Miami & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Miami, FL and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Fort Lauderdale Coral Springs Pembroke Pines Boca Raton West Palm Beach Miami Hialeah Miramar
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our general contractor services.

How long will my remodeling project take?

The timeframe depends on the scope of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

Do I need to obtain permits for my remodeling project?

In most cases, yes. We will handle all necessary permitting to ensure compliance with local building codes.

What if unexpected issues arise during the remodel?

We have extensive experience dealing with unforeseen challenges and will work with you to find the best solutions.

Built on Miami Values

Get a free consultation and discover how Veloz Contractors can bring your vision to life.

Let's Begin →
